name: Markdown Notes Publisher
tagline: Saves BFrost items as local Markdown files for Obsidian, Logseq, Joplin, or any notes folder.
description:
A consumer worker that turns selected Item Bus entries into local Markdown notes. It can save `news.article`, `research.paper`, or any configured item type into a folder chosen by the operator.

The worker is built for low-code use: choose a folder, keep the default item types, run a producer, then approve the generated file-write actions. Notes include source links, optional YAML frontmatter, and BFrost item metadata.
author: @ccascio

versions.changelog: Initial source-backed release with folder settings, note templates, approval-backed file writes, dashboard view, and low-code README.
